title: Virginia Occidental
excerpt:
Consumer Assistance in West Virginia

Contact your state department of insurance to get consumer help with a health insurance problem or question.

Medicaid in West Virginia

You can apply for Medicaid in West Virginia by contacting your state Medicaid agency.

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® in West Virginia

SHOP Health Insurance Marketplace® for Employees in West Virginia

Health Insurance Marketplace® in West Virginia

CHIP in West Virginia

CHIP covers uninsured children in families with moderate incomes that are too high to qualify for Medicaid. You can find out whether your children qualify for CHIP right now. Fill out a Marketplace application and find out whether your children qualify. Learn more about CHIP in West Virginia.
